{{CargoRelic
|name=Statue of Pharaoh Hor
|class_id=21273
|rank=AAA
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=This is a statue of Pharaoh Hor of the Thirteenth Dynasty of ancient Egypt, discovered near the pyramid of Amenemhat III. The statue is made of wood, well-preserved, showcasing the pharaoh's slender physique and gentle lines. The pharaoh's left foot is stepping forward, with arms raised towards the sky. Through fine carving techniques, the statue reflects the pharaoh's demeanor and temperament, giving the statue a sense of liveliness and dynamism.
|fame=35
|art=73
|fth=46
|civ=48
|tech=41
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70
|ss7=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
